name: Mimosa Granita
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the orange juice and sugar in a large bowl until the sugar dissolves.
2. Stir in the sparkling wine and lime juice, then pour the mixture into two ice cube trays.
3. Freeze the mixture until firm, at least 2 hours (the frozen cubes can be transferred to zipper-lock plastic bags and stored in the freezer for up to 1 week).
4. Just before serving, place a single layer of frozen cubes in a food processor fitted with a steel blade. Pulse 10 or 12 times, or until no large chunks of ice remain.
5. Scoop the crystals into individual bowls. Repeat with the remaining ice cubes and serve immediately.
